summary: KYC Video Upload feature and error handling tested - All features working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users: step3final{timestamp}@test.com, kycvideo{timestamp}@test.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC video upload feature fully implemented and working. Step 3 shows both 'Start Video' (for recording) and 'Upload Video' (for gallery uploads) buttons. Backend upload-file endpoint properly handles videos via field='selfie_video'. Error handling includes session expired (401), file too large (413), and timeout messages. Backend logs include file size and content type info.

1_kyc_step3_start_video_btn.details: Start Video button visible with data-testid='start-video-btn'

2_kyc_step3_upload_video_btn.details: Upload Video button visible with data-testid='upload-video-btn', allows file selection from gallery

3_video_file_input.details: Hidden file input accepts video/* files (line 789: accept='video/*')

4_video_upload_endpoint.details: /api/kyc/upload-file accepts field='selfie_video' and uploads to Cloudinary

5_video_success_message.details: After upload success, green checkmark and 'Video recorded successfully' message appears

9_error_handling_invalid_field.details: Backend returns 400 for invalid field names

11_error_messages_session_expired.details: Frontend shows localized 'Session expired' message for 401 responses

12_error_messages_file_too_large.details: Frontend shows localized 'File too large' message for 413 responses

13_error_messages_timeout.details: Frontend shows localized 'Connection timeout' message for timeout errors

14_backend_logging.details: Backend logs file size and content type for uploads

15_english_translations.details: English keys exist: sessionExpired, fileTooLarge, uploadTimeout, uploadVideo, videoFileTypeError, videoTooLarge

16_italian_translations.details: Italian translations exist for all new error messages and video upload strings

17_desktop_view.details: Desktop shows 'Choose File' only (no camera buttons)
